name: daycare-agent-system
description: 13-agent AI pipeline for daycare business planning — demographics, gap analysis, site selection, real estate, compliance, financials, SBA business plan, project plan, market map, grants, and competitor deep-dive.

scripts.lint: node --input-type=module --eval "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const h = readFileSync('public/index.html','utf8'); const s = h.match(/<script>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/g); console.log('Script blocks:', s?.length); console.log('OK');"
